{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Shifting Skies arm
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Shifting Skies arm]] is a [[construct]] that [[Lindon]] and [[Fisher Gesha]] are working on.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
